title: BTC War Market Guides
description: Machine-readable updates about live Bitcoin price, market depth, order flow, and the BTC War visualization.

items.title: Designing a Readable WebGL Crypto Visualization Across Six 3D Battlefields
items.summary: How one market-data model, consistent visual anchors, bounded motion, and performance constraints keep six Three.js and WebGL scenes readable.

items.title: Medieval Siege vs Champion Duel: Two Views of Crypto Market Pressure
items.summary: A comparison of army-scale siege warfare and continuous one-on-one combat as two visual forms of live BUY and SELL pressure.

items.title: Voxel Siege and Arcane War: Visualizing Live Buy and Sell Pressure
items.summary: Two fantasy-style WebGL scenes that map live aggregate trades and visible depth into block-world and arcane combat.

items.title: From Bitcoin Battlefield to Space War: Visualizing Crypto Order Flow at Scale
items.summary: How one live market model becomes a stable ground front and a bounded three-dimensional fleet war.

items.title: How Live Crypto Order Flow Drives Six 3D Battlefields
items.summary: A visual tour of six WebGL battlefields driven by live crypto price, aggregate trades, market depth, and BUY/SELL pressure.

items.title: BTC Price Today: What 24-Hour Change, Volume, and Market Depth Mean
items.summary: A practical guide to rolling 24-hour BTC statistics, spread, depth, liquidity, and executed order flow.

items.title: Bitcoin Price, Market Depth, and Order Flow: A Practical Glossary
items.summary: Definitions and relationships for Bitcoin price, spread, order-book liquidity, market depth, executed order flow, and buy/sell pressure.
